/bin/zsh -c "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
import asyncio, inspect
import asgiref
from asgiref import sync
print(asgiref.__version__)
print(hasattr(sync, 'markcoroutinefunction'))
print(asyncio.iscoroutinefunction is inspect.iscoroutinefunction)
print(asyncio.coroutines._is_coroutine)
PY

/bin/zsh -c "sed -n '45,75p' .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/asgiref/sync.py && ./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
import asyncio
async def f(): pass
class A: pass
a=A(); a._is_coroutine=asyncio.coroutines._is_coroutine
print(asyncio.iscoroutinefunction(a))
print(asyncio.iscoroutinefunction(a.__call__) if hasattr(a,'__call__') else 'none')
PY"

/bin/zsh -c "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
import asyncio
from django.middleware.security import SecurityMiddleware
async def f(r): pass
x=SecurityMiddleware(f)
print(x.__dict__)
print(asyncio.iscoroutinefunction(x), getattr(x,'_is_coroutine',None) is asyncio.coroutines._is_coroutine)
print(SecurityMiddleware.__mro__)
PY
rg \"_is_coroutine\" -n django"
